programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society explore investment options to grow their savings. Meanwhile, Taarak is invited to join an exclusive investment group claiming to have experienced analysts.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak's interest is piqued when he sees well-known names in the promising investment group. But, he gets too excited by this and loses track of time, getting late for work.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak advises his boss to invest and personally invests as well. Subsequently, Jethalal seeks Taarak's advice regarding the same investment opportunity.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After hearing Taarak, everyone in Gokuldham Colony invests in the app. But will this investment bring them gains or is it all just a scam?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members are thrilled about their new investments. However, Bapuji cautions Jethalal not to celebrate until the profits are actually deposited in his account.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Excited by the potential for high returns, the colony members get ready for a key investment meeting. So, they are optimistic they can make a good profit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Excitement runs high in the colony as everyone invests heavily after a successful meeting, dreaming of massive returns within a year. But is this golden opportunity too good to be true?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony awaits the return on their investment, hoping it meets their expectations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Panic engulfs the society members, including Taarak's boss, after errors are discovered on the website and the group. So, left with no alternatives, they seek assistance from Inspector Pandey.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Residents of the colony panic when they realise they are victims of a large fraud. So, they are devastated to learn that they have lost all their investments.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony is gripped with panic after discovering their entire investment has vanished. With the cyber crime unit offering no certainty of justice, can they find a way to recover their lost money?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While the residents are gripped by stress over the issue, the police arrive at Gokuldham society with surprising news.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham members are astonished as Popatlal discloses how he solved the cyber fraud case through his keen intellect and bravery.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal disguises himself as a snake charmer and begins his investigation. However, he finds himself in a fix when he is about to get exposed.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After exposing the scammers and promising those affected that their money would be reimbursed, Popatlal is lauded for his heroic actions. Later, the members of the society apologise to Taarak.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Magician AK begins his act by appearing in three different places at the same time. The CID team is baffled when his body is found at the third location and he is also seen at other places.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Abhijit goes undercover as a theatre artist for a play that is under threat. However, a murder takes place on stage in front of everyone and the killer manages to escape.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu discover their parents' plans for their arranged marriages to other people. But, both of them refuse the marriage proposals, causing their parents to become concerned.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Champaklal attempt to persuade Tappu to consider marriage, but he firmly refuses. Meanwhile, Sonu faces similar pressure from her parents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu lament parental pressure for arranged marriage. Subsequently, Sonu's defiant words jolt Bhide awake from his slumber.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu frets as marriage pressure mounts, his usual tricks exhausted. Later, he scrambles for a cunning plan to evade the looming nuptial expectations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu come up with a plan to hire an actor to help them avoid getting married. But will their plan work?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu convince the actor to help them in this situation. Will their plan work out?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chotelal, disguised as an astrologer, advises Bhide to stop worrying about Sonu's marriage now, in an attempt to help Sonu escape the situation. Will Bhide be convinced?

programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham attend Popatlal's name-changing ceremony. Popatlal cries because he does not want to change his name.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to recommend various names that begin with P for Popatlal. Madhavi calls Vinu Kaka to approve of the new name.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to think of a new name beginning with the letter P for Popatlal. Bawri suggests a name that everyone loves.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal changes his name to Pyaare and convinces everyone to call him by his new name. Madhavi believes that Popatlal's new name will bring him good luck.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Pyaarelal doubts his name change, but Anjali shares news of a marriage prospect. Taarak decides to stay in the house all day.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak gets permission to leave work after telling his boss about Pyaarelal's single life. Pyaarelal meets his potential bride, but her family prefer his old name.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While talking to Jethalal, Taarak gets very emotional about the food Anjali makes him eat daily. Carrying the tiffin he was trying to avoid, he comes up with a plan to deal with it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali is furious that Taarak has been giving away her home-cooked meals to strangers. She calls a meeting with all the men of Gokuldham to make a decision.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali is upset and deeply hurt to see Taarak eating a heavy breakfast with the Gadas. Champaklal supports Taarak until Anjali tells him about what Taarak did with her home-made meals.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Anjali goes out of town for a day, Jethalal plans an elaborate feast for Taarak. In order to avoid eating diet food cooked by Daya, Taarak fakes being ill. Anjali finds out and gets tensed.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal asks Natu Kaka and Bagha to bring food to Taarak. They eventually land in trouble when Goli spots them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi's news of Anjali's homecoming creates an uproar. The men try to hide themselves in the kitchen, and Taarak attempts to divert Anjali's attention from the smell.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The women become angry upon realising their husbands' dishonesty and plot revenge. Daya recommends a clever approach to eradicate the rat from Taarak's kitchen.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Anjali tries to walk away, Taarak persuades her with a song and promises to obey her. Meanwhile, Tapu Sena is excited to bring Lord Ganesha to Gokuldham society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Champaklal's feet hurt, Jethalal and Tapu fight over helping him. Later, Jethalal feels embarrassed in front of Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal's phone stops functioning and he tries various techniques to fix the problem. Later, he decides to purchase a smartphone from Jethalal's store.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal is keen on buying his new phone as per the auspicious time given by the priest. At the shop, he harasses Jethalal over selecting the phone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Popatlal thinks he has lost his phone, Jethalal has it and plans to play a prank. Later, he uses Popatlal's phone to send weird text messages to the women of the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The messages that the women of Gokuldham Society get from Popatlal end up instigating them against their husbands.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Following Jethalal's prank in the Gokuldham society, there is mayhem in the lives of all his married friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Pandey says that the culprit is an insider, everyone is very eager to know his name. Hearing this, Jethalal begins to worry about himself and tries to defuse the situation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is saddened when he sees that everyone in the Gokuldham society except him is taking a day off work.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's angst hits the limit when Bagha asks for a day off from Gada Electronics to go on a date with Bawri.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the members of Gokuldham society are excited to welcome Daya's mother as they gear up for celebrations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal, with a bucket in hand, slyly makes his way to Taarak's house to get some warm water. On the other hand, Taarak asks Abdul to buy him some delicious breakfast in Anjali's absence.

programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.
